summary: Completed testing of FAOD-SECOURS73 platform based on review request requirements. Backend APIs are fully functional with all required endpoints working correctly. CRITICAL integration issue identified: Frontend cannot communicate with backend due to external URL being unavailable (404 errors).

integration_issues.issue: Frontend configured to use external preview URL (https://faod-secours-73-16mars-20h22-d8kxl.preview.emergentagent.com) which returns 404 - all login and API calls failing
integration_issues.impact: CRITICAL - Complete breakdown of frontend-backend integration, no user authentication possible

passed_tests: Frontend landing page loads correctly with proper navigation
Login page accessible with complete form elements
PSC public chapters page loads with chapter content
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend-backend integration. The external preview URL (https://faod-secours-73-16mars-20h22-d8kxl.preview.emergentagent.com) is returning 404 errors. Either the external environment needs to be restored or the frontend needs to be configured to use the working localhost backend for proper testing. All backend functionality is confirmed working on localhost:8001.
